title: Tucson Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Tucson with a Z-Score of +3.34. The event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Tucson is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 10.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 15%, exacerbating the heat. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 4.3 km/h, but it is not enough to provide significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to protect the population and infrastructure.
